title: My Work on Dashboards
excerpt: Love My Work, could it be made a widget in Dashboards? +the ability to filer a bit more. The ability to quickly produce reports with a summary of ‘tasks completed this week’, ‘upcoming tasks’ would be really useful

posts.author: AJR (Allen Russell)
posts.cookedHtml: Love My Work, could it be made a widget in Dashboards? +the ability to filer a bit more. The ability to quickly produce reports with a summary of ‘tasks completed this week’, ‘upcoming tasks’ would be really useful
